case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. GABRIELA GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1430 GATEVIEW COURT #D, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94130, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE; DECLARATION OF JULIA ADAMS IN SUPPORT THEREOF, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP SERVED MAY-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $11.11. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND JUDGMENT OF JUN-10-2016 SET ASIDE
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON NOV-04-2025.
